name: Homebrew Packages
description: Installs Homebrew packages using Homebrew (Linuxbrew). ARM64-compatible; mirrors the `package` option of ghcr.io/devcontainers-extra/features/homebrew-package without using nanolayer.

packages.description: Comma-separated list of Homebrew packages to install (e.g. "eza,bat,zsh"). Whitespace around commas is ignored. Taps are supported in the usual `tap/name` form.
